name: Shredded Pork Delight
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Lean pork, finely shredded (about 3/4 lb)
1 cup Sliced mushrooms, fresh or canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the pork into fine narrow strips. Marinate in soya sauce, wine, salt, and pepper. Shred the bamboo shoots and slice the mushrooms. Assemble the other ingredients.
2. Heat oil in a wok until it begins to smoke slightly. Quickly stir-fry the pork shreds in the oil. Cook for 5 minutes until all the pork is browned. Cover and cook under medium heat for an additional 3 minutes.
3. Uncover the wok, add peas, bamboo shoots, and 6 tablespoons water. Cover and cook for 2 minutes. Uncover, then add mushrooms and cook for another 3 minutes. Place on a platter.
NOTE: Chicken can be substituted for pork.
